requirement.title: REQ-2118
requirement.requirement: The tool must be adapted continuously to changes of level 1 functionality.Based on the tool, the supplier must create a '' black list?Â of level 1 relevant data for the monitoring, to allow a check of changes relevant for the monitoring.Additionally to that list, in the supplier documentation all level 1 labels influencing level 2 / 3 labels must be marked specially.
